summary: Lead accepts M7-MAP-PRESENTATION-QUALITY-001 after systems_architect ACCEPT and independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT. Fixed implementation commit 762059e65b05ed02db6a298aaa4a31089a64d5a9 productizes M7 map presentation while preserving map authority boundaries. Task may proceed to PR integration gate, but must not be CLOSED until PR CI passes and the accepted branch enters origin/main.
acceptance_basis: Writer handoff validates and documents fixed implementation scope.
systems_architect ACCEPT validates map authority, Pixi render-cache boundary, UI/Web i18n boundary, allowed paths, and no manual-node-battle/geography/server/telemetry drift.
Independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT reran task/handoff/diff/test gates and found no blockers.
Post-implementation commits before acceptance are process/handoff/route/state only.

closure handoff and task state update after main integration

risks.summary: Web and Storybook builds retain existing large chunk warnings.
risks.mitigation: Track under performance/loading work; not introduced by this task.

risks.summary: Canvas helper is not the primary Web map surface; BrowserPixiMapRenderer is the active surface covered by E2E behavior.
risks.mitigation: If canvas fallback becomes supported later, require explicit pan/zoom/hover visual coverage.
